testcase.name: Health Checks › API health endpoint responds
Health Checks › MCP health endpoint responds
Health Checks › Web app loads
Health Checks › Console loads
Health Checks › Docs loads
Health Checks › Database connection works
Health Checks › Redis connection works
Subdomain Routing › snapback.dev serves marketing
Subdomain Routing › console.snapback.dev routes to SaaS
Subdomain Routing › docs.snapback.dev routes to docs
Subdomain Routing › api.snapback.dev returns JSON
Subdomain Routing › Cookies work across subdomains
Cross-Service Integration › Web → API: Fetch user data
Cross-Service Integration › API → Database: Query executes
Cross-Service Integration › MCP → API: Tool calls API
Cross-Service Integration › Docs → API: Search calls API
Authentication Flow › Sign Up Flow › user can sign up with valid credentials
Authentication Flow › Sign Up Flow › sign up fails with invalid email
Authentication Flow › Sign Up Flow › sign up fails with weak password
Authentication Flow › Sign Up Flow › sign up fails when passwords don't match
Authentication Flow › Email Verification › user can verify email with valid token
Authentication Flow › Email Verification › email verification fails with expired token
Authentication Flow › Login Flow › user can log in with valid credentials
Authentication Flow › Login Flow › login fails with invalid credentials
Authentication Flow › Login Flow › login shows rate limiting after too many attempts
Authentication Flow › Logout Flow › user can log out successfully
Authentication Flow › Logout Flow › session is invalidated after logout
Authentication Flow › Password Reset › user can reset password with valid email
Authentication Flow › Password Reset › password reset fails with non-existent email
Authentication Flow › Password Reset › user can set new password with valid reset token
Authentication Flow › Password Reset › password reset fails with weak new password
Authentication Flow › Session Persistence › user session persists after page refresh
Authentication Flow › Session Persistence › session expires after inactivity timeout
Authentication Flow › Auth Across Subdomains › session cookie works across subdomains
Authentication Flow › Auth Across Subdomains › API requests include auth credentials across subdomains
API Integration › API Key Creation › user can create API key with valid credentials
API Integration › API Key Creation › API key creation fails without authentication
API Integration › API Key Creation › API key creation fails with invalid permissions
API Integration › API Key Usage › API requests work with valid API key
API Integration › API Key Usage › API requests fail with invalid API key
API Integration › API Key Usage › API requests fail with expired API key
API Integration › API Key Permissions › read-only API key can read but not write
API Integration › API Key Permissions › admin API key has full access
API Integration › Rate Limiting › API requests are rate limited after threshold
API Integration › Rate Limiting › rate limit resets after time window
API Integration › Error Handling › API returns proper error format for bad requests
API Integration › Error Handling › API returns proper error for not found resources
API Integration › Error Handling › API handles malformed requests gracefully
MCP Tools › List Available Tools › user can list available MCP tools
MCP Tools › List Available Tools › tool listing includes proper metadata
MCP Tools › List Available Tools › tool listing fails without authentication
MCP Tools › Execute create-snapshot Tool › user can execute create-snapshot tool with valid parameters
MCP Tools › Execute create-snapshot Tool › create-snapshot fails with missing required parameters
MCP Tools › Execute create-snapshot Tool › create-snapshot fails with invalid file paths
MCP Tools › Execute restore-snapshot Tool › user can execute restore-snapshot tool with valid parameters
MCP Tools › Execute restore-snapshot Tool › restore-snapshot fails with non-existent snapshot
MCP Tools › Execute analyze-risk Tool › user can execute analyze-risk tool with valid parameters
MCP Tools › Execute analyze-risk Tool › analyze-risk fails with unsupported AI provider
MCP Tools › MCP Error Handling › MCP returns proper error format for tool execution errors
MCP Tools › MCP Error Handling › MCP handles rate limiting for tool executions
MCP Tools › MCP Error Handling › MCP tools respect user permissions
Documentation Search › Search Functionality (Cmd+K) › user can open search with Cmd+K shortcut
Documentation Search › Search Functionality (Cmd+K) › user can type search query and see results
Documentation Search › Search Functionality (Cmd+K) › search shows no results for non-existent terms
Documentation Search › Search Functionality (Cmd+K) › search filters results by category
Documentation Search › Search Results Display › search results show proper metadata
Documentation Search › Search Results Display › search results are properly ranked
Documentation Search › Search Results Display › search results highlight search terms
Documentation Search › Navigate to Search Result › user can click search result to navigate to page
Documentation Search › Navigate to Search Result › navigation preserves search context
Documentation Search › Navigate to Search Result › user can navigate back to search results
Documentation Search › Docs Navigation › sidebar navigation works correctly
Documentation Search › Docs Navigation › breadcrumb navigation works
Documentation Search › Docs Navigation › table of contents navigation works
Documentation Search › Docs Navigation › next/previous page navigation works
Full User Journey › Complete flow: signup → verify → login → create API key → use MCP → view analytics → search docs › new user can complete entire workflow
Full User Journey › Complete flow: signup → verify → login → create API key → use MCP → view analytics → search docs › user can navigate between services seamlessly
Full User Journey › Multi-page journey › user workflow spans multiple pages and sessions
Full User Journey › Cross-service integration › data flows correctly between web, API, MCP, and Docs
Full User Journey › End-to-end validation › all services report healthy status throughout journey
Full User Journey › End-to-end validation › user data is consistent across all services
Performance › Page load times < 2s › marketing page loads within 2 seconds
Performance › Page load times < 2s › dashboard page loads within 2 seconds
Performance › Page load times < 2s › documentation page loads within 2 seconds
Performance › API response times < 200ms › health check endpoint responds within 200ms
Performance › API response times < 200ms › user profile endpoint responds within 200ms
Performance › API response times < 200ms › MCP health endpoint responds within 200ms
Performance › Search response < 500ms › documentation search responds within 500ms
Performance › Search response < 500ms › API search endpoint responds within 500ms
Security Features E2E › Cross-Subdomain Cookies › session cookies persist across subdomains
Security Features E2E › Cross-Subdomain Cookies › cookies sent with credentials: include
Security Features E2E › Adaptive Turnstile › shows challenge after 5 failed login attempts
Security Features E2E › Adaptive Turnstile › bypass cookie works after successful challenge
Security Features E2E › Step-Up Authentication › requires step-up for billing operations
Security Features E2E › Step-Up Authentication › step-up window expires after 300s
Security Features E2E › Passkey Enforcement › requires passkey for API key creation
Security Features E2E › Passkey Enforcement › enforces passkey enrollment after TOTP use
Security Features E2E › RLS Tenant Isolation › prevents cross-org data access
Security Features E2E › HIBP Password Validation › rejects breached passwords
Security Features E2E › Security Headers › includes all required security headers
Security Features E2E › Security Headers › CSP blocks inline scripts
Security Features E2E › JWT for Tools Only › rejects JWT from browser User-Agent
Security Features E2E › JWT for Tools Only › accepts JWT from tool User-Agent
